title: SPCE Stock Earnings: Virgin Galactic Hldgs Beats EPS, Beats Revenue for Q2 2024
text: Virgin Galactic Holdings reported second-quarter 2024 financial results that exceeded analyst expectations on both key metrics. The company delivered earnings per share of negative $4.36, surpassing the projected loss of $4.92 per share. Revenue totaled $4.22 million, representing a 25.60% outperformance against the anticipated $3.36 million.
